---
title: "The Economist"
page-layout: article
---

# The Economist

## Description

Current and archival magazine source covering world affairs, economics, business, politics, science, and culture. Supports current awareness and international policy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics, Real Estate & Property Data
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics, Real Estate & Property Data

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://web.library.yale.edu/economist)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
